name: New
descr: Bug report was created and awaits assignment

name: Pending Assignment
descr: No suitable developer is assigned yet

name: Assigned
descr: Bug is assigned to a developer

name: In Progress
descr: Developer is working on the bug

name: Resolved
descr: Developer marked the bug as resolved

name: Retest Required
descr: Tester or PM must verify the resolution

name: Rejected
descr: Bug assignment or classification was rejected and needs follow-up
